author: nflaig
content:
4. including it in `payload_attributes` event as top-level field, we are likely gonna change that in gloas since we remove `parent_block_number` so we could add a `heze` version of this which adds `inclusion_list_bits`, this seems better to me than adding it to `PayloadAttributesV<N>` because the local execution client doesn't care about it and we can keep the change isolated to the beacon-apis event definition

so since (2) seems controversial, I would probably go with (4), but we can also further consider (1) as an option but needs more discussion
